# Role Interaction Checklist

Use this checklist when planning cross-functional collaboration to ensure all necessary interactions are covered.

## Pre-Project Planning

- [ ] **Identify Core Roles**
  - [ ] Project Manager identified and available
  - [ ] Product Manager aligned on scope
  - [ ] Technical leadership assigned
  - [ ] Key Developers assigned

- [ ] **Identify Specialized Roles (if needed)**
  - [ ] Quality Assurance Lead assigned (if quality-critical)
  - [ ] Risk Management Specialist assigned (if high-risk)
  - [ ] Stakeholder Communications Manager assigned (if complex stakeholder landscape)
  - [ ] Technical Architecture Owner assigned (if architectural decisions required)

## During Project Initiation

- [ ] **Kickoff Meeting Participants**
  - [ ] All assigned roles included
  - [ ] Clear agenda covering each role's contributions
  - [ ] Decision-making authority documented
  - [ ] Interaction points and cadence established

- [ ] **Establish Communication Norms**
  - [ ] Status update frequency and format defined
  - [ ] Escalation criteria and process documented
  - [ ] Decision log owner identified
  - [ ] Meeting cadence established

## During Planning Phase

- [ ] **Quality Assurance Alignment** (if QA Lead assigned)
  - [ ] Testing strategy reviewed
  - [ ] Quality gates defined
  - [ ] Test coverage targets established
  - [ ] Release criteria agreed

- [ ] **Risk Management Planning** (if Risk Specialist assigned)
  - [ ] Risk identification session conducted
  - [ ] Risk register created
  - [ ] Mitigation strategies assigned
  - [ ] Escalation criteria defined

- [ ] **Stakeholder Communication Planning** (if Communications Manager assigned)
  - [ ] Stakeholder list and interests documented
  - [ ] Communication frequency determined
  - [ ] Key messages and channels identified
  - [ ] Update owner and approval process defined

- [ ] **Technical Architecture Review** (if Architecture Owner assigned)
  - [ ] Technical architecture reviewed
  - [ ] Key design decisions documented
  - [ ] Technical dependencies identified
  - [ ] Architecture review process established

## During Execution

- [ ] **Regular Interaction Touchpoints**
  - [ ] Developer/QA collaboration on testing
  - [ ] Project Manager/Risk Specialist reviews on risks
  - [ ] Project Manager/Communications coordination on updates
  - [ ] Developer/Architecture reviews on design decisions

- [ ] **Decision-Making Clarity**
  - [ ] Decisions made with right stakeholder involvement
  - [ ] Decision authority respected
  - [ ] Decisions documented with rationale
  - [ ] Stakeholders informed of decisions affecting them

- [ ] **Escalation Path Clarity**
  - [ ] Blockers escalated appropriately
  - [ ] Risk escalations handled promptly
  - [ ] Quality issues resolved with QA Lead input
  - [ ] Communication issues addressed

## During Release

- [ ] **Quality Assurance Sign-off** (if QA Lead assigned)
  - [ ] Quality gates reviewed and met
  - [ ] Release readiness assessed
  - [ ] Known issues documented and accepted
  - [ ] Release approval granted

- [ ] **Risk Management Review** (if Risk Specialist assigned)
  - [ ] Active risks reviewed for release impact
  - [ ] Mitigation strategies in place
  - [ ] Rollback plan ready

- [ ] **Stakeholder Communication** (if Communications Manager assigned)
  - [ ] Release announcement ready
  - [ ] Success criteria communicated
  - [ ] Post-release communication plan established

## Post-Project/Retrospective

- [ ] **Capture Role Feedback**
  - [ ] Each role's perspective on collaboration effectiveness
  - [ ] Interaction improvements identified
  - [ ] Decision-making effectiveness assessed
  - [ ] Communication effectiveness evaluated

- [ ] **Document Lessons Learned**
  - [ ] Effective interaction patterns documented
  - [ ] Friction points identified
  - [ ] Recommendations for future projects recorded
  - [ ] Role clarity issues addressed

---
